TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: salengacay a tademaw, u tatama ciniza, nalecuhan i 1 a bulad 5 a demiad 1956 a mihcaan, Frank-Walter Steinmeier, u misingkiway. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Germany ayza sa ci Frank-Walter Steinmeier, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihca 3 bulad 19 demiad.
S.PHON: sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw, u tatama ¶iniza, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad **** a mińß ¶aan, frank-war~…ĺt…ôr st…ôinm…ôi…ôr, u misiŇčkiwaj. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu g…ôrmanj ajza sa ¶i frank-war~…ĺt…ôr st…ôinm…ôi…ôr, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad.
S.FORM: salengacay a tademaw, u tatama ciniza, nalecuhan i 1 a bulad 5 a demiad 1956 a mihcaan, Frank-Walter Steinmeier, u misingkiway. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Germany ayza sa ci Frank-Walter Steinmeier, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihca 3 bulad 19 demiad.
S.PHON: sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw, u tatama ¶iniza, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad **** a mińß ¶aan, frank-war~…ĺt…ôr st…ôinm…ôi…ôr, u misiŇčkiwaj. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu g…ôrmanj ajza sa ¶i frank-war~…ĺt…ôr st…ôinm…ôi…ôr, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad.
